Sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

Tired.Description: current state of tiredness of the participant

Study_time.Description: number of hours the participant studied

GPA.Description: Grade Point Average of the participant

Caffeine.Description: Time since last caffeine consumption of the participant

Occupation_field.Description: field of occupation of the participant

answered.Description: indicates if the participant answered a question

backGroundColor.Description: background color setting for the task

textColor.Description: color of the text used in the task
